dev_summary: Recent commits have significantly enhanced the Admin tool, introducing a robust inter-tool service contract system with capability gateways, enabling tools to communicate with each other via typed services. A new tool dev tracking system with phase badges, summaries, and next steps has been implemented, alongside a lightweight issue tracker for bug and feature requests. The tool discovery process now automatically scaffolds new tools with the necessary files, facilitating rapid development.
next_steps: Implement the 'think' service contract, mirroring the 'grove' service.
Develop the complete 'toolname:resource:action' handler within electron/main.js, including full error handling.
Integrate the 'ideas' functionality with the new service contract system, enabling the LLM to generate prompts for tools.
